---
title: "Figure 1: Deep single-nuclei transcriptomic atlas of the human substantia nigra"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

#ODC: "cadetblue1","deepskyblue3","blue4"
#Micro:  "green3","palegreen","green4"
#Astro: "salmon1","red4","firebrick1","peachpuff"
#DaN: "lightgoldenrod1","goldenrod","tan1","darkorange3"

#cols = c("orange","gold","darkolivegreen3","dodgerblue","purple") # disease stage


pA <- DimPlot(sn_atlas_processed,
              reduction = "umap",
              group.by = "CellType",
              split.by = "Disease") +
      ggtitle("A")
pA

markers <- c("TH","SLC6A3","GFAP","AQP4","MOBP","MOG","CSF1R")

pB <- DotPlot(sn_atlas_processed,
              features = markers,
              dot.scale = 8) +
      RotatedAxis() +
      ggtitle("B")
pB

pC <- VlnPlot(sn_atlas_processed,
              features = "nFeature_RNA",
              group.by = "CellType") +
      ggtitle("C")
pC

meta <- sn_atlas_processed@meta.data

df <- meta %>%
      group_by(Sample_v2, CellType) %>%
      summarise(n = n())

pD <- ggplot(df, aes(CellType, n, fill = Sample_v2)) +
      geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90)) +
      ggtitle("D")

pD

pE <- DimPlot(sn_atlas_processed,
              reduction = "umap",
              group.by = "CellSubType",
              split.by = "Disease") +
      ggtitle("E")
pE

sub_markers <- c("AGTR1","TMEFF2","SOX6","LMX1B","ALDH1A1")

pF <- DotPlot(sn_atlas_processed,
              features = sub_markers) +
      RotatedAxis() +
      ggtitle("F")

pF

figure1 <- (pA | pB) /
           (pC | pD) /
           (pE | pF)

ggsave("figures/Figure1.pdf",
       figure1,
       width = 16,
       height = 12,
       device = "pdf")
